fingerprint_string: Mixed metric/imperial fasteners across materials, showing maintenance-driven purchasing with moderate quantities for diverse repair applications.
notable_patterns: Orders balanced 50/50 between metric and imperial thread systems
Prefers corrosion-resistant finishes (zinc variants) and black oxide for durability
Mixed fastener types including cap screws, lag screws, nuts, and washers indicating diverse maintenance needs
Moderate quantities (50-500 pieces) suggesting project-based rather than production purchasing
